cr-ethirteen-plus.note: IMPORTANT: 'e13 Plus' doesn't match any current e*thirteen product as a standard pedal crankset. The closest name match, 'e*spec Plus Cranks', is actually an E-BIKE MOTOR-INTERFACE crank arm system (Bosch CX Gen4 / Brose S Mag / Shimano EP8 specific) with no chainring of its own -- structurally different from this catalog row (which has ring:32, ringStd:'standard-12', a normal pedal-bike spec). This looks like a data-entry mismatch, not just an unsourced part -- flag for a data-entry review rather than further weight sourcing.

fr-santacruz-megatower-cc.note: Manufacturer support page (santacruzbicycles.com Megatower 2 MY24) confirms 230x62.5 std shock (catalog had 65 - FIXED), Boost148, BSA73 threaded, 31.6 post, PM, UDH, 2.5 max tire, 170mm fork (180 ok); frame page states 7.17 lbs + \ MSRP (price FIXED) but weight doesn't state size or shock inclusion - weight bar not met.

fr-frameworks-enduro.note: No frame-only weight published anywhere -- only complete-bike weights found in reviews (41.5lb build, varies hugely by component spec). Interfaces already sourced from the manufacturer page and correct. Bar not met for weight; row stays as labeled sample-data weight pending a future measured-weight pass.

fk-marzocchi-bomber-z1-29-160.note: Marzocchi's current Bomber Z1 product page only lists 100/150/160mm travel options -- no 170mm variant exists in their current lineup. This catalog row (170mm) may be based on a nonexistent/discontinued config; page also lists a fixed 180mm max rotor and 2109g weight untied to any specific travel, neither of which cleanly matches this row. Flagging for a data-entry decision rather than silently correcting travel to 160.

fk-canecreek-helm-mkii-air-29-160.note: Cane Creek's own product page confirms the Helm MkII 170mm travel option is ONLY available in 27.5in wheel size -- the 29in Air version tops out at 160mm. This catalog row (29in/170mm) appears to be a nonexistent combination, same pattern as the Marzocchi Bomber Z1 170 and Galfer/RT-MT900 220mm rotors flagged earlier. Needs a data-entry decision (likely: correct to 29/160 as a new id, or 275/170 as a separate row) rather than a silent fix.

fk-manitou-mattoc-pro-29-150.note: Hayes' current Mattoc Pro page only lists 29in travel options up to 150mm (110/120/130/140/150) -- no 160mm variant exists in the current lineup. Likely another nonexistent-SKU catalog row, same pattern as the Marzocchi Bomber Z1 170 and Cane Creek Helm 170/29in flagged in the previous batch. Flagging for a data-entry decision.

ro-galfer-223-6b.note: Galfer's current 6-bolt lineup has no 220mm size -- their sizes run 140/160/180/200/203/223mm. This catalog row may be based on a nonexistent SKU (closest real size is 223mm); flagging for a data-entry decision (correct to 223 as a new id, since size is engine-read and ids are append-only) rather than silently guessing a weight for a product that may not exist.

ro-shimano-rtmt900-203-cl.note: Shimano's RT-MT900 (XTR) appears to top out at 203mm (140/160/180/203mm sizes found) -- no 220mm size turned up anywhere, manufacturer or retailer. Likely a nonexistent SKU in this catalog row; flag for a data-entry correction rather than guessing a weight for a size that may not exist.

dp-fox-transfer-factory-316-180.note: CORRECTED drop 175->180 (ridefox.com confirms Transfer options are 120/150/180/210/240mm only -- 175mm doesn't exist, same nonexistent-SKU pattern as several forks/rotors this session; retired old id into ALIASES). No clean single weight found for the 180mm/31.6 Factory config -- only a range (608g manufacturer-ish vs 640g measured, neither directly fetched). Bar not met for weight; interfaces now correct.

st-straitline-318.note: Ambiguous naming: third-party listings show 'SSC Stem 35mm' alongside '31.8 0d x 35mm' variants, suggesting '35mm' in this product line may refer to STEM LENGTH, not clamp diameter (unlike this catalog row's clamp:35 assumption). Straitline's own site wasn't reachable to disambiguate (Pinkbike review 403-blocked). Flag for a data-entry review of the clamp field before further verification.
